productDisplayName: Mr.Men Men's White Round Neck T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline that has blue tape detailing on the inseam and slightly distressed look graphic with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you think that a bit of attitude gets things rolling in the right direction, then this round neck t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the slighty distressed look Mr. Mean graphic with the flock print detailing and the lettering "A bit of mean keeps them keen" gives an edgy feel to the tee.
